name: request-build
description: Given a wallet, a GitHub login, and an idea in words, verify the wallet holds >= threshold $Z and return the exact OpenHands-triggering issue that WOULD be created (dry-run; it never creates it).

wallet.description: base58 Solana pubkey of the requester; its $Z balance is checked on-chain

github_login.description: GitHub username to credit as the requester in the issue body

idea.description: the build request in plain words; its first line becomes the issue title

authorized.description: true only if the wallet holds >= threshold $Z

balance.description: uiAmount of $Z held (from the gate skill)

gate.description: the full (optionally signed) holder verdict from skills/gate for auditability

would_create.description: the exact { title, body, labels:[fix-me] } issue a write-capable step would create; null when unauthorized

dry_run.description: always true — this skill never creates issues or applies labels

call.idea: Add a dark mode toggle to the roster page

would_create.title: [build] Add a dark mode toggle to the roster page

config.Z_MINT: <Z_MINT_ADDRESS — Andy provides at launch; same value the gate uses>
config.Z_THRESHOLD: <token amount for the build tier — Andy sets from a dollar target>
